mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real GDP expands corporate earnings expectations, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns show no statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid increases in the federal funds rate compress equity valuations by raising the discount rate for future cash flows, yielding negative forward returns.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in more than 50 percent of triggered instances, contradicting the discount rate compression mechanism.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in the unemployment rate and increases in total nonfarm payrolls confirm labor market recovery, boosting consumer spending and equity valuations over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns do not exceed baseline when both labor indicators align, or Rank IC falls below 0.04 over a 2-year period.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production contracting below historical norms signals supply-side bottlenecks or demand destruction, leading to negative equity returns over the following month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in more than 60 percent of triggered instances despite industrial contraction.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts indicate strengthening consumer confidence and construction activity, providing immediate positive momentum to equity markets within one week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no correlation with housing starts growth, or the signal yields negative returns in over 55 percent of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation erodes real purchasing power and prompts hawkish Federal Reserve responses, depressing equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: Inflation spikes do not lead to statistically significant negative 20-day returns, or equity valuations remain resilient to rate hikes.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in retail sales and housing starts validates broad-based demand expansion, sustaining positive equity returns over a three-month horizon as corporate revenues accelerate.
failure_condition: Joint demand indicators fail to predict positive 60-day returns above random chance, or the interaction term shows zero predictive power.

mechanism_narrative: When unemployment remains below 5 percent, tight labor markets support wage growth and consumer spending, driving positive equity returns over the following month.
failure_condition: Equity returns turn negative when unemployment stays below 5 percent for consecutive quarters, invalidating the full employment premium.
